/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,fishbot_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/fishbot_interfaces/fishbot_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/fishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/fishbot_interfaces/_fishbot_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/hell0/esp32_car2/extra_packages/build/fishbot_interfaces/rosidl_generator_py/fishbot_interfaces:/home/hell0/esp32_car2/extra_packages/build/fishbot_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/fishbot_interfaces/libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libfishbot_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
